failure_reason: RuntimeError: WMS database at C:\Users\vipVi\PycharmProjects\Game-1\Game-1-modular\saves\world_memory.db appears to be from schema version 1 (no schema_meta table). Schema v2 introduces the 6-tier geography hierarchy (adds region_id/nation_id/world_id columns, drops the dormant realm_state table). Old databases are not loadable. Delete the file and let the game regenerate it. See docs/ARCHITECTURAL_DECISIONS.md §6.
fallback_taken: WMS disabled; downstream consumers will no-op
